zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas Griffin於1476年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可時，他的父親John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer26歲，母親Lady Emmote Whetehill15歲。他於1495年與Anne Throckmorton在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1509年5月15日在他的家鄉享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas Griffin于1476年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可时，他的父亲John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer26岁，母亲Lady Emmote Whetehill15岁。他于1495年与Anne Throckmorton在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1509年5月15日在他的家乡享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Griffin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Gruffin, Griffin, a pet form of Middle Welsh Gruffudd. In the Welsh border counties this name was introduced directly from Welsh, and in the eastern counties of England by Bretons from France who came over with the Norman conquest.
Irish: Anglicized (part translated) form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha ‘descendant of Gríobhtha’, a personal name from gríobh ‘gryphon’.

variants.name: Griffee
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffy
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffey
meanings: Irish (Clare): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas Griffin was born in 1476, in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, his father, John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer, was 26 and his mother, Lady Emmote Whetehill, was 15. He married Anne Throckmorton in 1495, in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 15 May 1509, in his hometown, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas Griffin est né en 1476, à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Emmote Whetehill, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Anne Throckmorton en 1495, à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 15 mai 1509, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas Griffin 1476 in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer 26 und seine Mutter Lady Emmote Whetehill 15. Er hat 1495 in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Anne Throckmorton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 15. Mai 1509 im Alter von 33 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Griffin è nato il nel 1476 nel Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Emmote Whetehill, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Anne Throckmorton nel 1495, nel Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 15 maggio 1509, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Griffinが1476年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークで生まれた時，父John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimerは26歳，母Lady Emmote Whetehillは15歳であった。1495年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークでAnne Throckmortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1509年5月15日に故郷で33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Griffin(이)가 1476년 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Emmote Whetehill(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에서 Anne Throckmorton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1509년 5월 15일 그의 고향에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Griffin nasceu em 1476, em Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Emmote Whetehill, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Throckmorton em 1495, em Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 15 de maio de 1509, em sua cidade natal, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas Griffin родился в 1476 г. в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Emmote Whetehill, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Throckmorton в 1495 г. в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 15 мая 1509 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Nicholas Griffin nació en 1476, en Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Emmote Whetehill, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Anne Throckmorton en 1495, en Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1509, en su pueblo, a la edad de 33 años.
